/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/data_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/data_recorder_interfaces/srv/start_recording__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bryce/ros2_workspace/data_collection_ws/build/data_recorder_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
